meaning: Kairwan[kaIE`wB:n]凯万[突尼斯东北部城市](伊斯兰教圣地)
examples: On Friday, police cordoned off roads into Kairouan, in central Tunisia, and prevented hundreds of people from entering.
"There is the potential for disruption to traffic in the area of Kairouan and possible confrontations with security forces, " an advisory said.
